title: Giza Reduced Gate Ledger
final_status: VALIDATION-READY FULL-BUILD ENGINEERING CLOSURE - NOT ARCHAEOLOGICALLY VALIDATED

gates.name: water_applied_lower_node_gate
gates.result: Water-applied lower node functions as hydraulic receiving/surge/reset candidate.
gates.surviving_claim: The lower node can be screened as a functional water-applied engineering input.
gates.binding_constraint: A water-applied lower node must receive, surge, vent/reset, and remain controllable.
gates.falsifier: A water-applied lower event cannot enter, cycle, reset, or remain pressure-safe.
validation_needed: source application route if making archaeological claim

gates.name: air_management_gate
gates.result: Sealed pressure fails, but vent/Well Shaft/reset architecture rescues it.
gates.surviving_claim: The lower hydraulic system survives as air/vent/reset/isolation infrastructure.
gates.binding_constraint: Displaced air must vent or buffer fast enough to avoid unsafe pressure.
gates.falsifier: Measured Well Shaft or passage geometry cannot vent required air volume before unsafe pressure.

gates.name: long_range_mechanical_transfer_gate
gates.result: Pressure, air displacement, and coherent mechanical transfer die under baseline.
gates.binding_constraint: Useful coherent energy must reach a midlevel or upper work interface.
gates.falsifier: Measured damping/coupling leaves surviving motion below useful interface thresholds.
validation_needed: only if someone wants to revive transfer claim: damping/coupling experiment

gates.name: guided_path_gate
gates.result: Grand Gallery / Ascending Passage strongest semi-guided candidate; Well Shaft air/bleed; granite stiff local candidate.
gates.surviving_claim: Observed architecture can be classified as candidate guided/air-control/stiff local paths.
gates.binding_constraint: Candidate paths must outperform rough limestone and remain active-phase coherent.
gates.falsifier: Measured damping/coupling makes guided candidates no better than rough core transfer.

gates.name: plug_isolation_gate
gates.result: Granite plugs screen as final isolation/decommissioning boundary.
gates.surviving_claim: Plugs survive as final isolation boundary, not as proof by themselves.
gates.binding_constraint: Final closure must isolate lower wet/air domains from upper domains.
gates.falsifier: Plug location or geometry cannot meaningfully isolate air, water, or residue domains.

gates.name: ordinary_mass_movement_gate
gates.result: Throughput-limited baseline is repaired by modest lane/cycle changes.
gates.surviving_claim: Ordinary mechanics move the mass under repaired throughput assumptions.
gates.blocked_claim: Water is required to move every block.
gates.binding_constraint: Force, worker density, braking, staging, and accepted-block throughput must close.
gates.falsifier: Period-compatible movement cannot meet required accepted-block rate inside available lane/crew constraints.

gates.name: placement_seating_gate
gates.result: Placement/seating screens under stated correction authority.
gates.surviving_claim: Blocks count only after stopping, transfer, orientation, seating, checking, correction, and acceptance.
gates.binding_constraint: Moved blocks must become accepted placed blocks before lock-in.
gates.falsifier: A block can arrive but cannot be oriented, seated, corrected, and accepted.

gates.name: precision_restoration_gate
gates.result: Precision closes by drift suppression / restoration loops under stated thresholds.
gates.surviving_claim: Precision is handled as detect-correct-recheck-lock restoration, not perfect manual placement.
gates.blocked_claim: Precision required repeated perfect manual placement.
gates.binding_constraint: Reference drift, detection thresholds, and correction authority must stay ahead of lock-in.
gates.falsifier: Expected drift exceeds detection/correction authority before the next check interval.

gates.name: upper_workcell_integration_gate
gates.result: Simultaneous upper operations fail, but phased upper operations produce viable repaired layouts.
gates.surviving_claim: Upper workcell closure depends on phased sequencing.
gates.blocked_claim: Upper workcell closes without phased sequencing.
gates.binding_constraint: Upper movement, braking, final placement, correction, references, casing, access removal, and throughput must coexist.
gates.falsifier: No phased upper workcell layout can host required tasks while maintaining accepted-block throughput.
validation_needed: phased upper workcell physical layout trial

gates.name: residue_prediction_gate
gates.result: Residue model predicts lower wet/mineral zones and plug-isolation contrast; contamination controls required.
gates.surviving_claim: Residue chemistry is a testable spatial prediction layer.
gates.binding_constraint: Residues must form a controlled spatial pattern, not a generic contamination or decay signature.
gates.falsifier: Measured residues are random, modern, substrate-only, or contradict lower-wet / plug-isolation / upper-dry predictions.

gates.name: historical_attestation_gate
gates.surviving_claim: Engineering closure can be reported without archaeology claim.
gates.binding_constraint: Historical proof requires independent archaeological or textual evidence.
gates.falsifier: A historical claim is made without independent evidence.

surviving_system_statement: Given water applied to the lower node, repaired ordinary throughput, and phased upper-workcell operations, the model reaches full-chain engineering closure with no required simulated gate failing. Ordinary mechanics move and place mass; precision restoration suppresses drift; the lower hydraulic subsystem manages water/air/reset/isolation; phased upper workcells close final placement, correction, casing finish, and access-removal coexistence. Historical use is not claimed.
blocked_claims: Lower pulse mechanically seats upper blocks.
Grand Gallery is proven as a hydraulic waveguide.
King Chamber receives useful pressure from the lower node under baseline.
Salt/alum/sulfate residues prove hydraulic use without spatial controls.
Upper workcell closes without phased sequencing.
critical_validation_tests: residue mineral map with contamination controls
